form_input_type.description: Renamed from 'type' to avoid the discriminator collision. Original: string (optional). One of: text, email, password, number, url. Default: text.

inline_alert_type.description: Renamed from 'type' to avoid the discriminator collision. Original: string. Severity level — "info", "warning", "error", or "success".
